summary: Delete IDs shared with The Trade Desk via a product catalog for the specified merchant ID.

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid JSON, missing items, merchant not configured, or policy restrictions

403.description: Forbidden - Cannot process data subject request for this merchant

413.description: Request Entity Too Large - Request size exceeds the allowed limit

429.description: Too Many Requests - Rate limit exceeded

500.description: Internal Server Error - Unexpected server error

503.description: Service Unavailable - Handler disabled or request dropped
